actions.value: Save tenant-scoped quotation and line items
Return submitted quotation to editable state
Create one sales invoice from one or many quotations
Original, duplicate, and office-copy print views
Assign, attachments, PDF, email, tags, WhatsApp

events.value: Confirmed quotation with amount greater than zero

planningNotes.body: Connect confirmed quotations to accounts preview and reliable background synchronization.
planningNotes.title: Accounts integration

planningNotes.body: Move assignment, attachments, email, tags, and WhatsApp activity from local UI state to audited backend records.
planningNotes.title: Persist entry tools

planningNotes.body: Add stronger database types for dates, money, structured items, and tenant-aware indexes when the billing schema is hardened.
planningNotes.title: Schema hardening
